---
title: "HTA - Health Technology Assessment"
---

Supporting payer and regulatory evidence submissions including indirect treatment comparisons, network meta-analyses, systematic reviews, and value dossier statistical inputs.

### HTA — Additional Access

HTA analysts working with clinical trial data need CLUWE access to specific compound/study folders (Step 2). 

Ask your Lilly Lead for the exact CLUWE path.

### Vault Clinical / eTMF Access

#### Lilly FTE

[ServiceNow](https://lilly.service-now.com) → "eTMF account request". Lilly Lead can initiate. Accounts created within 1–2 business days.

#### Vendor / Contractor

[ServiceNow](https://lilly.service-now.com) → More → Accounts and Passwords → Application Accounts and Access → **eTMF account request**. Vendor or Lilly Lead can submit. 1–2 business days.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### HTA — Additional Training

| Course ID | Title |
|-----------|-------|
| 9141872 | LRL-CDOS: DISCLOSE — Developing Medical Regulatory Documents and Payer Dossiers |
| 9295008 | LRL: Vault Clinical Foundations |
| 9317635 | MED-QUAL: Evaluation of Potential Data Integrity Issues in Approved Documents |
| 9143108 | LRL-CDOS: DISCLOSE — Register Trial and Post Publicly |
